name: email-handler
description: Email command center for Dimitris Plessas. Reviews inbox with briefings, insights, and action flags. Drafts replies matching his communication style. Sends via Outlook AppleScript. Self-improves by comparing drafts to actual responses.

email-handler.description: Reviews Outlook inbox with briefings, action recommendations, drafts and sends replies in Dimitris Plessas's style

shared.description: Communication style guide, recipient profiles, and learning data
